channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Chernobyl's radioactive landscape is testament to nature’s resilience and survival spirit
item.description: Four decades after the nuclear disaster at Ukraine’s Chernobyl power plant, wildlife is thriving again in what became the exclusion zone created by the forced mass evacuations of the population.
item.dc:creator: Derek Gatopoulos And Evgeniy Maloletka, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: The one thing scammers check before targeting you online
item.description: Most scams start with a simple search, not a hack. Your personal data is already publicly available on data broker sites and used to target you.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mexico’s climate supercomputer could change forecasting
item.description: Mexico is building the Coatlicue supercomputer to deliver sharper weather forecasts and earlier storm warnings and support for artificial intelligence research.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: What San Francisco’s AI billboards say about the state of the industry
item.description: Here in San Francisco, we live in a bubble, and we know it. While much of the rest of the country sees the city through the lens of Fox News cameramen searching out homeless encampments, we actually live in a very beautiful, very wealthy, and, currently, very AI-obsessed place.
item.dc:creator: Mark Sullivan, Fast Company

item.title: White House chief of staff meets with Anthropic CEO over its new AI technology
item.description: White House chief of staff Susie Wiles has met with Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei to discuss the company's new AI model, Mythos.
item.dc:creator: Josh Boak And Matt O'Brien, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Broadcom’s Facebook friend will help train it to accelerate AI workloads
item.description: A partnership between Broadcom and Meta could benefit other datacenter operators, as the networking company hones its expertise for supporting AI development.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Oracle delivers semantic search without LLMs
item.description: Oracle says its new Trusted Answer Search can deliver reliable results at scale in the enterprise by scouring a governed set of approved documents using vector search instead of large language models (LLMs) and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG).
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Equinix offering targets automated AI-centric network operations
item.description: Equinix has introduced Fabric Intelligence, a service designed to automate and optimize network infrastructure as enterprises scale artificial intelligence workloads across multiple distributed locations.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: Tech company cuts 1,000 jobs in AI-driven restructuring
item.description: The Fox News AI Newsletter gives readers the latest AI technology advancements, covering the challenges and opportunities AI presents.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: How to think about Apple Business
item.description: Apple Business is aimed at small businesses coalesced around Macs, iPhones, and iPads. If that’s you, and all your systems are made by Apple, the service is likely to be all you need to run a small operation of up to a few dozen seats.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: This new Google Pixel phone is exclusive to Japan
item.description: Despite Google’s status as one of the true giants of U.S. tech, it’s never quite been able to make its Pixel phones a mainstream success. Last year, for instance, the company enjoyed record U.S. sales in September after the launch of the Pixel 10 line, according to Counterpoint Research.
item.dc:creator: Sam Byford, Fast Company

item.title: Exciting Python features are on the way
item.description: Transformative new Python features are coming in Python 3.15. In addition to lazy imports and an immutable frozendict type, the new Python release will deliver significant improvements to the native JIT compiler and introduce a more explicit agenda for how Python will support WebAssembly.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Blancco confirms Mac adoption is accelerating
item.description: While sales of new Macs are surging the second-user market is also seeing strong momentum, prompting Blancco Technology Group and Cambrionix to introduce a new solution to help quickly erase and prepare large numbers of Macs for sale.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Intel: Latest news and insights
item.description: More processor coverage on Network World: AMD news and insights | Nvidia news and insights Intel is hoping for a turnaround under its new CEO, Lip-BuTan. Intel’s Q1 2025 revenue was $12.7 billion, flat year-over-year.
item.dc:creator: Network World
